title: CPF Investment Scheme (CPFIS)
text:
CPF Investment Scheme (CPFIS) - SupportGoWhere
CPF Investment Scheme (CPFIS)
Share link
Provides CPF members an option to invest their OA and SA savings to enhance retirement funds.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Grants multiple options to invest your Ordinary Account (OA) and Special Account (SA) savings
Collapse all sections
About this support

Members can invest their OA and SA savings in a wide range of products to enhance their retirement savings under the CPF Investment Scheme (CPFIS).

Who is this for?

To be eligible to invest in CPFIS, you must meet all the following criteria:

At least 18 years old

Not an undischarged bankrupt

Have more than $20,000 in OA and / or more than $40,000 in SA

Completed the CPFIS Self-Awareness Questionnaire (SAQ)

If investing in the CPFIS- OA scheme, you may only invest up to 35% of your investible savings for stocks and 10% for gold. Investible savings refers to the sum of your OA balance and the amount of CPF you have withdrawn for investment and education.

To find out how much of your OA and SA savings can be used for investment, you may:

Log in to my cpf digital services with your Singpass, then select “my cpf” > “My dashboards” > “Investment”

Log in to the CPF Mobile app with your Singpass, then select “Investment”

Visit any CPF Service Centre with your identity card

Upon reaching age 55, you can withdraw your CPFIS-OA and CPFIS-SA investments, as well as the cash balance in your Investment Account, after setting aside the Full Retirement Sum (FRS) in your Retirement Account

The FRS can be set aside fully with cash / with cash (i.e. at least the Basic Retirement Sum) and property

Once your withdrawal application is approved, your CPFIS investments will be transferred to you. The withdrawal will not result in liquidation of your investment holdings

Your agent bank and / or product providers will contact you about transferring your investments to you

How to apply?

New CPFIS investors must first take the Self-Awareness Questionnaire (SAQ) before they can start investing

The SAQ helps you to assess if you have basic financial knowledge and whether CPFIS is suitable for you

To start investing under CPFIS-OA, open a CPF Investment Account with one of the following CPFIS agent banks:

Overseas-Chinese Banking Corporation Ltd (OCBC)

United Overseas Bank Ltd (UOB)

DBS Bank Ltd (DBS)

After opening the account, approach product providers to buy or sell investments

For CPFIS-SA:

Approach product providers directly to buy or sell investments

Where can I find help?

View more details

CPF hotline: 1800-227-1188

To avoid waiting on the line, you may book an appointment here.

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Visit your nearest branch

Scheme last updated 29 Apr 2026
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
